pre_spec_semantics.description: Shared vocabulary for intent-layer, pre-spec semantics, and operator-request mediation.

proposal_governance.description: Shared vocabulary for proposal promotion and proposal-lane authority states.

runtime_artifact_kind.description: Machine-readable artifact kinds used by supervisor-owned derived or tracked surfaces.

intent_layer_overlay.definition: Viewer-facing overlay rebuilt from tracked intent-layer nodes.

operator_request_packet.definition: One bounded external steering packet normalized into an OperatorRequest.

pre_spec_semantics_index.definition: Derived index over tracked pre-spec semantic artifacts and their downstream lineage.

proposal_lane_overlay.definition: Viewer-facing overlay rebuilt from tracked proposal-lane nodes.

proposal_promotion_index.definition: Derived index for proposal-promotion provenance and boundedness.

specgraph_vocabulary_index.definition: Derived index that flattens the shared vocabulary layer for viewers and tooling.

vocabulary_drift_report.definition: Derived report that flags vocabulary drift across canonical specs and runtime artifacts.

pre_spec_artifact_class.description: First-class tracked artifact classes that persist observable meaning before proposal-lane or canonical promotion.

user_intent.definition: Captured pre-spec artifact that preserves observable user meaning before bounded execution.

operator_request.definition: Typed, one-run execution request normalized from pre-spec meaning into a supervisor steering artifact.

pre_spec_primary_kind.description: Primary semantic kinds for the pre-spec layer coordinated by SG-SPEC-0050.

intent.definition: Normative declaration of what should become true, remain possible, or be preserved.

hypothesis.definition: Epistemic declaration of what may be true in the problem space.

proposal.definition: Candidate design move that operationalizes one or more intents under constraints and assumptions.

intent_fragment.definition: Minimal extracted semantic unit that appears to express part of an intent.

intent_draft.definition: Synthesized pre-spec node assembled from one or more intent fragments plus supporting context.

spec_draft.definition: Reviewable pre-canonical draft of later specification shape.

pre_spec_lifecycle_state.description: Review-visible lifecycle states used by tracked pre-spec surfaces.

captured.definition: Observable user meaning has been captured but not yet normalized into executable steering.

mediated.definition: The captured meaning has been reduced into a bounded pre-spec artifact.

ready_for_execution.definition: The pre-spec artifact is bounded enough to steer one supervisor run.

executed.definition: The bounded execution request has been run without yet classifying downstream effect.

proposal_linked.definition: The pre-spec artifact has emitted or linked into proposal-lane material.

canonical_candidate.definition: The pre-spec artifact has reached a canonical-spec candidate or accepted refinement surface.

blocked.definition: Execution or promotion is presently blocked.

superseded.definition: The tracked pre-spec artifact remains inspectable history but is no longer current.

operator_request_source_kind.description: Admissible upstream sources for OperatorRequest normalization.

chat_instruction.definition: Direct bounded steering from chat or textual operator input.

gui_selection.definition: Bounded steering supplied by a viewer or GUI selection surface.

mediated_artifact.definition: Bounded steering derived from a prior mediated pre-spec artifact.

operator_request_run_mode.description: Execution modes permitted for one bounded OperatorRequest.

targeted_refine.definition: Run one bounded supervisor refinement pass for an explicit target spec.

split_proposal.definition: Emit one bounded split proposal for an explicit target spec.

operator_request_stop_condition.description: Explicit stop conditions carried by typed OperatorRequest execution contracts.

first_structured_outcome.definition: Stop once the run yields one structured supervisor outcome.

review_boundary_reached.definition: Stop once the run reaches a review boundary or review-pending candidate.

blocked_by_gate.definition: Stop once a blocking gate or blocker is reached.

proposal_emitted.definition: Stop once one bounded proposal artifact has been emitted.

child_materialized.definition: Stop once one bounded child materialization has completed.

proposal_artifact_class.description: Governed artifact classes for promotion and proposal readiness.

working_draft.definition: Exploratory, uneven, or implementation-heavy material not yet normalized into reviewable proposal form.

reviewable_proposal.definition: Normalized, bounded proposal artifact suitable for review and deterministic promotion checks.

proposal_authority_state.description: Review-visible authority states for tracked proposal-lane nodes.

under_review.definition: Proposal exists and is awaiting bounded human or governed review.

approved_for_application.definition: Proposal has passed review and may be applied to canonical truth.

rejected.definition: Proposal was explicitly denied for application.

superseded.definition: Proposal remains inspectable history but has been replaced by a newer proposal or queue state.
